title: Cosmos Graph · Neural Mesh — a dense breathing neural net with depth parallax; synapses fire
title_vi: Cosmos Graph · Neural Mesh — mạng nơ-ron dày có chiều sâu (parallax); synapse bắn xung
summary: A dense, breathing neural-network graph with depth (parallax on pointer move); synapses fire as pulses along the dendrites in teal with magenta sparks. Evokes a living mind. Self-contained Canvas 2D.
usage_notes: RUN: open file. TECHNIQUES: nodes at varied depth (size/alpha by z); nearest-neighbour edges; pointer parallax shifts by depth; pulses fire on edges (additive). THEME: Ra = bright soma. Reference for the diary-view Graph facet.
summary_vi: Đồ thị mạng nơ-ron dày, "thở", có chiều sâu (parallax theo chuột); synapse bắn xung dọc dây thần kinh, tông teal + tia hồng. Gợi cảm giác bộ não sống. Canvas 2D tự chứa.
notes: Graph effect sample (Ra) for the diary-view Graph facet. repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/diary-concepts/graph-effects/3-neural-mesh.html
